rationale: Educ. Code §28.024 governs high school graduation credit for academy enrollment. It is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption in Tax Code §11.13(b); no overlap or conflict exists.
quote: A school district shall grant to a student credit toward the academic course requirements for high school graduation, up to a maximum of two years of credit, for courses the student successfully completes at:
_note: Rule text concerns academy enrollment credits; no bearing on property tax homestead exemption.
